description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch, on opened and synchronized pull requests, and on a weekly schedule every Monday. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.12) on an ubuntu-latest environment. For each Python version, it checks out the code, sets up a Docker build with a specific Dockerfile, builds a Docker image, sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies with pip, and runs tests with a bash script.
